title: potentilla meyeri
intro: Potentilla meyeri, also known as Dwarf Cinquefoil, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae) native to mountainous regions of China. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its purported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as promoting digestive health and supporting immune function. Potentilla meyeri can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or tincture, often in combination with other herbs, to leverage its medicinal properties and harness its health benefits.
